heroDescription: Explore ByteDance Seedance video generation models on Novita AI for text-to-video and image-to-video workflows with cinematic motion and prompt following.
seoDescription: Explore Seedance AI models on Novita AI. Compare Seedance 1.5 Pro text-to-video and image-to-video model pages for API integration.
overviewBody: Seedance is ByteDance Seed's video generation model family for creating short videos from text prompts and source images. Public Seedance material emphasizes cinematic motion, prompt adherence, multi-shot storytelling, subject consistency, and high-quality visual dynamics.

On Novita AI, this collection organizes enabled Seedance variants into text-to-video and image-to-video entry points. Open each model page to confirm supported parameters, pricing, and Playground behavior before integrating it into production.

lineupSections.title: Seedance 1.5 Pro
lineupSections.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro appears in Novita's model lineup as the enabled Seedance Pro tier for text-to-video and image-to-video generation.
items: Use the text-to-video variant when the starting point is a written prompt.
Use the image-to-video variant when preserving or animating a source image is required.
Confirm audio, duration, resolution, and frame options on the model page because public model-family pages do not fully define all Novita API parameters.

faq.question: What is Seedance used for?
faq.answer: Seedance is used for AI video generation, including text-to-video and image-to-video workflows. Official Seedance material highlights prompt following, cinematic motion, multi-shot generation, and visual consistency.

faq.question: What is the difference between Seedance text-to-video and image-to-video?
faq.answer: Text-to-video starts from a written prompt. Image-to-video starts from a source image and generates motion while preserving the visual subject and scene.

models.name: seedance-1.5-pro-i2v
models.description: Animate source images into videos with Seedance 1.5 Pro image-to-video generation.

models.name: seedance-1.5-pro-t2v
models.description: Generate videos from text prompts with Seedance 1.5 Pro text-to-video generation.
